{{Quote|For allowing this to happen, we are all diminished.|[[Etahn A'baht]]|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
The '''Battle of Gyndine''' was an early battle of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Background==
{{Quote|The attack on Gyndine indicates a change in the enemy's battle campaign. Clearly they are probing for weaknesses, perhaps routes into the Core.|[[Sien Sovv]]|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] was quickly set up as a [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] planet during the initial war. Following the fall of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], many of the survivors came to Gyndine.

==The battle==
{{Quote|The Yuuzhan Vong have overrun our defenses, Ambassador. The fight's lost.|Wurth Skidder, to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
The Yuuzhan Vong also launched an assault on the planet soon afterward, aided by agents disguised in [[ooglith masquer]]s provoking hysteria among the population. Fortunately for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Wurth Skidder]] helped defend the planet. Despite a valiant two-day campaign on the part of the new Republic forces, the Yuuzhan Vong were still able to burn the planet's forests and boil its lakes using [[Fire Breather]]s, which was the first time the New Republic encountered those weapons. A large number of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] refugee ships were destroyed in the initial wave of the Yuuzhan Vong attack - along with passengers - and the New Republic was forced to abandon the planet, its inhabitants, and the refugees.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Gyndine is lost.|Sien Sovv|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
After the battle ended the Yuuzhan Vong began to gradually [[Terraforming/Legends|terraform]] the planet, slowly killing off the refugees trapped on Gyndine. The New Republic was able to evacuate 5,000 civilians from the world, many of them having been relocated to Gyndine from worlds already conquered by the Yuuzhan Vong. Because the vast majority of the evacuees were from worlds that had been early members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], many saw it as discrimination against former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]].

During the battle, Jedi [[Klin-Fa Gi]] was presumed killed; in actuality, however, she used her apparent death as a means of secretly traveling to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] to spy on Yuuzhan Vong activities.

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] won a New Republic [[Raid on Gyndine|victory]] at Gyndine during the lead-up to a [[Battle of Ebaq|major action]] against the Yuuzhan Vong at [[Ebaq 9]]. Later in the war, an [[Attack on Gyndine|attempt]] to liberate the world would be lost. Gyndine was eventually [[Defense of Gyndine|recaptured]] from the Yuuzhan Vong by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and his fellow [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].
